About ACD Hotels

The Advanced
Comfort Dwelling

ACD — Advanced Comfort Dwelling — is Chennai's most exciting capsule hotel. We reimagined budget travel as a five-star adventure. Premium pods, zero compromise.

Check-in 12:00 PM  ·  Check-out 11:00 AM

Premium Capsule Design
Couple Friendly
Pay at Hotel
Ultra-Clean Facilities
Adults Only 18+
Prime Location
What Awaits You

Amenities That Spark Joy

Every detail crafted for the modern explorer. We turned the pod into your favourite place on earth.

Self-Cooking Kitchen
Your inner Gordon Ramsay has been waiting. Fully equipped communal kitchen — cook, feast, repeat.
Cook Your Story
Free Laundry
Pack light, travel bright. Free laundry so you always look like you own the city.
Always Fresh
High-Speed WiFi
Stream, scroll, and stay connected at full speed. Lightning-fast WiFi, no buffering, no limits.
Always Connected
Snooker Table
Challenge a fellow traveller. Our full-size snooker table is where friendships and bragging rights are earned.
Game On
Pristine Bathrooms
Spotless. Sanitised. Sparkling. Inspected with military precision — a shower that feels like a standing ovation.
Squeaky Clean
Pay at Hotel
No prepayments. Book with ease, arrive with confidence, pay when you get here. Hospitality the honest way.
Zero Stress Booking

What Guests Say

Real Stories, Real Smiles

Based on Google Reviews
Priya Ramaswamy
2 weeks ago

Hands down the best capsule hotel in Chennai. Clean, cosy, and incredibly affordable. Free laundry and kitchen are absolute lifesavers!

Google Review

1 month ago

Stayed for our anniversary. The double capsule is surprisingly spacious and romantic. Staff are so warm. Will definitely return!

The snooker table is an unexpected gem! Met amazing people. ACD is not just a hotel — it's a community. Loved every minute!
